extensionName.description: Extension name displayed in Firefox about:addons

extensionDescription.message: Capture, clean, and seamlessly import any web page into Google NotebookLM with magic precision.
extensionDescription.description: Extension description displayed in Firefox about:addons

intentNoteLabelVisible.description: Label for the intent note field

intentNotePlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the intent note textarea

errorApiChanged.message: NotebookLM API has changed. An update is required.
errorApiChanged.description: User-facing error when API structure is modified

errorAuthExpired.message: Session expired. Please sign in to NotebookLM again.

errorUploadSessionMissing.description: User-facing error when upload URL is missing

errorTimeout.message: The request timed out. Please check your connection.

errorInjectionFailed.message: Cannot activate clipper on this restricted page.
errorInjectionFailed.description: User-facing error when script injection fails

errorUnknown.message: An unknown error occurred. Check the console.

menuContextImportSelection.description: Context menu item to import selected text

errNoSearchTerm.message: Enter a notebook name in the search field.

warnLocalFile.message: ⚠️ Local file — direct import is not available.

apiChanged.message: The NotebookLM API has been updated by Google. An extension update is required.

sessionExpired.message: Session expired. Please sign in again at notebooklm.google.com.

uploadSessionFailed.message: Upload failed: could not obtain an upload session.

timeout.message: Request timed out. Check your connection and try again.

unexpectedError.message: An unexpected error occurred. Check the console for details.

notifSelectionMsg.message: Click the NotebookLM Web Clipper button to choose a notebook.

errGetNotebooks.message: Could not retrieve your notebooks. Check your connection and reload.

errCreateNotebook.message: Could not create the notebook. Check your connection and try again.

errSelectionFailed.message: Could not import the selection. Please try again.

errWorkflowFailed.message: An error occurred during import. Check the console for details.

errInjectionFailed.message: Cannot activate the clipper on this page (system or restricted page).
errInjectionFailed.description: Error when script injection fails on a restricted page

btnUrlTitle.message: Instant import — NotebookLM scrapes the page

btnDirectTitle.message: Import the original file as is
